  • Constructor Details

    • Astrophage

      public Astrophage(int id, int size)
      A single Astrophage - the agent.
      Parameters:
      id - a number identyfying the astrophage
      size - the size of the board thet the astrophages exist on

      public void setX(int x)
      Moves this astrophage to a given column.

      x - the given column to move the astrophage to

      public void setY(int y)
      Moves this astrophage to a given row.

      y - the given row to move the astrophage to

      public void setAge(int age)

      age - what value to change the age to

      Sets the energy of this astrophage to a given value.
